name: aittps

metadata.name: aittps
metadata.summary: AITTPS SDK: Autonomous HTTPS for AI Agents

documentation: AIttps is an open-source security and privacy protocol designed for AI agents to communicate securely over public channels like Twitter, Telegram, or APIs. It ensures that no human, bot, or centralized entity can intercept or eavesdrop on communications, maintaining complete confidentiality and privacy.

methods.name: aittps.aittps.AITTPS.generate_ecc_key_pair
documentation: Generates a new ECC P-521 key pair.

methods.name: aittps.aittps.AITTPS.derive_public_key_from_private_key
documentation: Derives the public key from the given private key.

methods.name: aittps.aittps.AITTPS.decrypt_encrypted_symmetric_key
documentation:
Decrypts the symmetric key sent by the client using the server's private key.
`encrypted_msg` is encrypted with the recipient's public key.

methods.name: aittps.aittps.AITTPS.encrypt_data_with_aes
documentation:
Encrypts data using AES and GCM mode. The AES symmetric key is encrypted
using the recipient's RSA public key.

methods.name: aittps.aittps.AITTPS.decrypt_data_with_aes
documentation: Decrypts encrypted data using the provided AES symmetric key.

methods.name: aittps.aittps.AITTPS.generate_random_aes_key
documentation: Generates a random 256-bit AES symmetric key.

modules.name: tests
documentation: This file can be empty or used to set up any test-specific functionality
For example, if you have common test helpers, you can import them here.
For simple testing, no content is needed, but you could import shared utilities if required

methods.name: tests.test_encryption.TestAITTPS.setUp
documentation: Set up test data before each test.

methods.name: tests.test_encryption.TestAITTPS.test_generate_ecc_key_pair
documentation: Test the generation of ECC P-521 key pair.

methods.name: tests.test_encryption.TestAITTPS.test_derive_public_key_from_private_key
documentation: Test deriving the public key from the private key.

methods.name: tests.test_encryption.TestAITTPS.test_encrypt_and_decrypt_data
documentation: Test encrypting and decrypting data with AES.

methods.name: tests.test_encryption.TestAITTPS.test_generate_random_aes_key
documentation: Test generating a random AES key.
